div.head: Memorandum by the Adviser on Political Relations (Duggan) to the Under Secretary of State (Welles)
div.p: Mr. Welles: The Inter-American Commission for Territorial Administration may now be convened at any moment by any country adhering to the Habana Convention, as a result of the approval voted by the Governing Board of the Pan American Union at its last meeting of a resolution interpreting the Convention to provide that the Emergency Committee (Act of Habana) automatically becomes the Commission for Territorial Administration (Convention of Habana).
